calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-15-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Petition For Minors Compromise
Off Calendar Dec-31-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Elizabeth Bailey, Esq. for petitioner Yin Su Ma Leung, guardian ad litem for the minor Maggie Leung. After hearing the evidence, the Court grants the petition for minor's compromise as follows: From the total judgment of $10,000.00,the cost to reimbursed are $101.50 and attorneys fees of $2,474.62, for a net of $7,423.87, which shall be depositted into a blocked account until the minor reaches the age of eighteen. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599;

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2002 Off Calendar
